tasks.name: Write M33 plan doc — Copilot Service
tasks.scope: Author docs/plans/2026-04-16-team-x-phase-5-m33-copilot-service.md using M32 plan doc as structural template. 11 tasks (T0–T10), 11 invariants preserved, ABI rebuild dance documented in T10, commit cadence locked. 292 lines.

tasks.name: Migration 0011 + CopilotInsightsRepo
tasks.scope: Migration 0011 (table + composite index, FK CASCADE, CHECK on category + severity per Phase 5 §8.4) + Drizzle schema + CopilotInsightsRepo (6 methods: create / getById / listActive / dismiss / expireStale / upsertWithDedup) + 15 unit tests. Dedup contract locked: category-scoped → numeric-drift guard → Jaccard bigram > 0.8 (cheap rejections first). Same commit flipped Phase 5 design doc §9 M33 row 📋 → 🚧 In progress — 2 of 11 tasks shipped (2026-04-16).

tasks.name: system-copilot pseudo-employee + role card
tasks.scope: Second is_system=1 row per company alongside M31's system-agent. NEW role-packs/strategia-official/roles/system/system-copilot.md (117 lines, level: system, tools_allowed: M31 read-only set + query_copilot_insights, tools_denied locks out decompose_project / delegate_subtask / review_deliverable / shell / filesystem / network / send_message_to_colleague). NEW packages/shared-types/src/roles.ts exports SYSTEM_AGENT_ROLE_ID + SYSTEM_COPILOT_ROLE_ID + SYSTEM_ROLE_IDS tuple + isSystemRoleId() predicate. system-agent-bootstrap.ts extended with ensureSystemCopilot + shared ensureSystemEmployee internal (legacy EnsureSystemAgent{Args,Result} kept as type aliases). seed.ts seeds system-copilot inline after system-agent; SeedResult gains systemCopilotId. Filter sweep auto-covered by is_system=1 + level='system' — no regression risk in role-loader / listVisibleByCompany / agentic-tools-write scorer.
tasks.commitTemplate: feat(m33): M33 T2 — system-copilot pseudo-employee + role card

tasks.name: Rolling event window + bus subscription
tasks.scope: CopilotEventWindow class — in-memory Map<companyId, bounded deque> (default 100 events, private constant). Bus subscription pushes events, drops oldest on overflow. snapshot(companyId) defensive copy. Warm-start hydrates from eventsRepo.list on first snapshot per company. clear(companyId) wired to companies.archive. Unit tests +8 (bounds 3, isolation 2, warm-start 2, archive clear 1).
tasks.commitTemplate: feat(m33): M33 T3 — rolling event window + bus subscription

tasks.name: CopilotAnalyzerService — periodic scheduler + LLM + dedup + expiry
tasks.scope: Biggest task. CopilotAnalyzerService with start/stop/tick/getLastAnalysisAt. buildAnalysisPrompt (deterministic, ≤2000 tokens). Zod InsightDraftSchema + one-shot nudge retry on malformed JSON. Pause-aware providerRouter.complete wrapper (actor: system-copilot). Dedup via upsertWithDedup. Expiry via expireStale per cycle. Event-triggered debounced runs (30s) for meeting.ended / ticket.closed / goal.progressChanged / agentic.failed budget_exhausted. Migration 0012 extends runs.kind enum with 'copilot'. Unit tests +14.
tasks.commitTemplate: feat(m33): M33 T4 — copilot analyzer service + pause-aware scheduler

tasks.name: copilot.* IPC surface + preload bridge
tasks.scope: Four IPC channels per Phase 5 §8.6: copilot.insights, copilot.dismiss, copilot.ask, copilot.configure. Typed end-to-end via TeamXApi. Handlers in apps/desktop/src/main/ipc/copilot-handlers.ts. Preload bridge window.teamx.copilot. CopilotInsight wire type in packages/shared-types/src/copilot.ts. Unit tests +8 (4 channels × happy + error).
tasks.commitTemplate: feat(m33): M33 T5 — copilot.* IPC surface + preload bridge

tasks.name: copilot.ask routing + query_copilot_insights tool
tasks.scope: Route copilot.ask through AgenticLoopService.start with employeeId = system-copilot. Returns { runId, threadId } — same shape as M31 command.execute complex_request (M34 sidebar prereq). New query_copilot_insights tool factory (read-only, {rows, truncated} envelope, 50-row cap). Tool registry: system-copilot gets M31 read-only set + new tool; system-agent continues with original set. Two distinct system threads in Copilot Conversations sidenav. Unit tests +5.
tasks.commitTemplate: feat(m33): M33 T6 — copilot.ask routing + query_copilot_insights tool

tasks.name: Copilot settings + UI
tasks.scope: Three clamped settings keys: copilot_enabled (bool, default true), copilot_interval_minutes (1-60, default 5), copilot_categories (subset of 5 categories, default all). settings.getCopilot / setCopilot IPC. CopilotSection UI under Settings → Runtime (alongside agentic + planner). setCopilot triggers copilotAnalyzerService.restart(companyId). Unit tests +7.
tasks.commitTemplate: feat(m33): M33 T7 — copilot settings + UI

tasks.name: Canned copilot provider seam
tasks.scope: Three-tier canned seam (mirror M30 test-classifier / M31 test-agentic-provider / M32 test-agentic-tools). __ECHO_COPILOT__:<json> sentinel → canned per-prompt table → fallback. Extend test-agentic-provider with system-copilot-actor entries for T9 E2E. NODE_ENV=test swaps provider. Unit tests +5.
tasks.commitTemplate: test(m33): M33 T8 — canned copilot provider seam

tasks.name: copilot-service.spec.ts E2E round-trip
tasks.scope: Full round-trip against canned provider. Seed events → copilot.tick (test-only IPC) → assert insight persisted → dismiss → assert dismissed_at + audit row → copilot.ask → assert grounded answer on system-copilot thread → assert destructive gate ABSENT → assert two system threads distinguishable. Subagent pass for canned-script generation. +1 E2E spec file.
tasks.commitTemplate: test(m33): M33 T9 — copilot-service.spec.ts E2E round-trip

tasks.name: Documentation + verification + milestone marker
tasks.scope: docs/user-guide/copilot-service.md NEW (F10 style). Phase 5 design §9 M33 row 🚧 → ✅. CLAUDE.md Phase 5 section + IPC table + bus events table updated. CHANGELOG M33 entry. README Phase 5 row. .loki/CONTINUITY.md M33-COMPLETE header. Verification: pnpm -r typecheck clean, lint 0 errors ≤34 warnings, pnpm test ~1058/1058, ABI rebuild dance (node-gyp + electron-rebuild comma-separated -w), pnpm -F @team-x/desktop test:e2e:run 9 specs green. orchestrator.json history.M33 populated, currentMilestone → M34, pending.json cleared with M34 scope sketch.
tasks.commitTemplate: chore(m33): M33 T10 — verification + milestone marker

notes: M33 T2 SHIPPED (2026-04-16, commit 4ce9d3e). +4 unit tests (1048 → 1052, exact match to T2 target). NEW system-copilot role card (117-line role.md). NEW packages/shared-types/src/roles.ts — SYSTEM_AGENT_ROLE_ID + SYSTEM_COPILOT_ROLE_ID + SYSTEM_ROLE_IDS tuple + isSystemRoleId() predicate (future-proofing; is_system column stays authoritative runtime filter). system-agent-bootstrap.ts extended with ensureSystemCopilot + shared ensureSystemEmployee internal — legacy EnsureSystemAgent{Args,Result} kept as type aliases so M31 callers don't break. seed.ts seeds copilot inline after agent; SeedResult gains systemCopilotId. Filter sweep AUTO-COVERED — no employees.list / orgchart.get / hire-picker / delegation-picker / meeting-attendee code changes because is_system=1 + level='system' already gates every surface. 6 files (+563/-62), 0 lint errors / 24 warnings / typecheck clean.

M33 T1 SHIPPED (2026-04-16, commit 0a77d87). +15 unit tests (1033 → 1048, exact match to plan target). Migration 0011 + CopilotInsightsRepo + Drizzle schema additions. Dedup contract: category-scoped → numeric-drift guard → Jaccard bigram > 0.8. Phase 5 design doc §9 M33 row flipped 📋 → 🚧 In progress — 2 of 11 tasks shipped (2026-04-16) (same commit). 0 lint errors / 24 warnings / typecheck clean.

M33 T0 SHIPPED (2026-04-16T08:15Z, commit c5cdeee). Plan doc materializes T1–T10 with per-task scope + commit templates + test deltas. Totals: +~48 unit tests across T1–T8 (targets +~25 net — aligns with design §9 M33 estimate after accounting for incidental tests not counted in per-task deltas).

T3 is head-of-queue (rolling event window + bus subscription). Independent of T2's identity layer — reads only from bus + eventsRepo. Can share a session with T4 if T3 lands compact. T4 is biggest — full session, subagent candidate for prompt builder scaffolding. T5 is boilerplate (~30 min). T6 depends on T5 + T2 (system-copilot role_id). T7 is fast (~25 min). T8 prerequisite for T9. T9 is full session with one subagent pass. T10 is gate-only + docs (~60 min) — ABI dance mandatory.

Architectural seams active: three-tier canned test seam, {rows, truncated} envelope, data-step-kind stable E2E selector, pause-aware providerRouter wrapper, AbortController stop, atomic + ledger commits, bus-event + audit-row invariant (#11), is_system + filter-sweep pattern with new isSystemRoleId predicate (M33 T2 extracts this).
Blocker for M34: copilot.ask must return { runId, threadId } matching M31 command.execute complex_request shape so M34 sidebar attaches step-stream with no second wire format. Verify in T6.

ABI rebuild dance (verified across M31 + M32 T10 + re-verified at M33 T1 vitest): Node ABI `cd node_modules/.pnpm/better-sqlite3@11.10.0/node_modules/better-sqlite3 && npx node-gyp rebuild --release` (+ keytar), Electron ABI `pnpm -F @team-x/desktop exec electron-rebuild -f -w better-sqlite3,keytar` (comma-separated only — repeated -w flags crash @electron/rebuild@3.7.2).
